description: Anthropic with cache_creation (5m + 1h split) and cache_read. Anthropic's input_tokens is already net of cache. cache_creation total is 500; the 5m/1h ephemeral subsets are 200+100=300, leaving 200 untagged residual which lands in the default (5m) tier. So cache_write_5m = 200 (tagged) + 200 (residual) = 400.
